title: Percentage Increase Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate the final value after a percentage increase with instant results, formula guidance and practical examples.
metaTitle: Percentage Increase Calculator | Find the New Value Fast
metaDescription: Calculate a percentage increase online and get the new value fast. Useful for price rises, salary increases, growth tracking and quick percentage math.
intro: Use this percentage increase calculator when you need the value after an increase. It is useful for price changes, salary raises, traffic growth, budgets and any scenario where a number goes up by a percentage.
overview: This calculator matches the intent behind searches like percentage increase calculator, increase by 15 percent and percentage growth formula. It helps you find the final value after an increase without doing the math manually, which makes it handy for business, finance and everyday comparisons.
howItWorks: Enter the original value and the percentage increase.
The calculator adds the percentage to the starting number.
Review the new value and repeat the calculation for other growth scenarios if needed.
useCases: Calculate a salary raise or price increase.
Model growth in traffic, revenue or inventory.
Check markups, forecasts or scenario planning.
Verify spreadsheet calculations before sharing them.

examples.title: Price increased by 15%
examples.description: Useful for quoting new prices, renewals or percentage-based adjustments.

examples.title: Traffic growth of 8%
examples.description: Helpful for dashboards, forecasts and performance reporting.

faq.question: What does a percentage increase calculator show?
faq.answer: It shows the final value after adding a percentage to the original number.

faq.question: Can I use it for salary, price or traffic growth?
faq.answer: Yes. It works well for raises, markups, growth reporting, forecasting and similar percentage-based changes.

faq.question: Can I use this tool on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes. The page works on desktop and mobile screens with a simple input and result layout.
